evidence: src/agent.c:1198-1213 schedules a separate nomination check after pair selection
src/agent.c:1730-1735 adds USE-CANDIDATE only for requested nomination
src/agent.c:1589-1599 confirms nomination after a successful response
src/agent.c:1132-1147 exposes selected_entry before nomination
src/agent.c:1440 accepts both role attributes when their values differ
src/agent.c:1474-1484 compares the controlled-role request against ice_controlling instead of ice_controlled
src/agent.c:1615-1637 implements 487 role switching but regenerates the tie-breaker through the rejected entropy path
src/agent.h:45-54 fixes 30-second expiry and a randomized 4-to-6-second cadence
src/agent.c:1001-1010 fails the pair when consent expires
src/agent.c:1045-1051 sends Binding requests for consent
src/agent.c:1589-1590 extends expiry on success
src/agent.c:2544-2549 permits compile-time disable and uses the rejected random source for scheduling
src/agent.c:1319-1325 bypasses integrity verification for every non-400 TURN error
src/agent.c:1870-1905 accepts and stores 401 or 438 realm and nonce values
src/agent.c:1907-1945 accepts an unauthenticated 300 ALTERNATE-SERVER tuple
src/agent.c:2006-2008 sends the next request to that replacement tuple
src/stun.c:500-509 and 621-634 bound the message and attribute memory ranges
src/stun.c:906-909 and 1007-1010 accept nonzero-length flag attributes
src/stun.c:931-940, 981-989, and 991-1005 accept oversized fixed-format attributes
src/juice.c:28-31 exposes destroy without a separate cancellation operation
src/conn_thread.c:176 permits callback reentry on a recursive mutex
src/conn_thread.c:193-209 joins and frees connection state
src/thread.h:102-103 discards pthread_join errors, including a callback-thread self-join failure
src/log.c:34-36 defaults logging to WARN
src/agent.c:1302-1310 logs the selected ICE password on integrity failure
src/agent.c:518-520 logs the full remote SDP
src/ice.c:141-142 and 172-173 format ICE credentials into diagnostics
include/juice/juice.h:80-119 accepts string STUN TURN and bind endpoints
src/addr.c:253-266 resolves with getaddrinfo and no AI_NUMERICHOST
src/udp.c:145-155 resolves bind input with getaddrinfo
src/agent.c:219-247 creates the connection and gathers host candidates before an external candidate authorization boundary

findings.title: Predictable ICE and STUN TURN security randomness on both target platforms
evidence: src/random.c:17-18 excludes Android from getrandom
src/random.c:52-57 provides no secure macOS entropy source
src/random.c:60-101 falls back to realtime-seeded random
src/ice.c:165-168 uses it for ICE ufrag and password
src/agent.c:143-151 uses it for the ICE tie-breaker

findings.title: Remote input can trigger plaintext ICE password logging at the default log level
evidence: src/log.c:34-36 defaults to WARN
src/agent.c:1302-1310 writes the ICE password in a WARN diagnostic

findings.title: Unauthenticated Binding error responses can change role or fail a pair
evidence: src/agent.c:1265-1271 bypasses binding integrity for error responses
src/agent.c:1366-1373 dispatches responses by transaction ID
src/agent.c:1605-1652 applies unauthenticated error outcomes

findings.title: Unauthenticated TURN error handling can replace the destination tuple
evidence: src/agent.c:1319-1325 bypasses integrity for non-400 errors
src/agent.c:1907-1945 applies ALTERNATE-SERVER
src/agent.c:2006-2008 transmits to the replacement

findings.title: Public and internal APIs cannot enforce numeric-only authorization before socket and DNS boundaries
evidence: include/juice/juice.h:80-119 exposes string endpoints
src/addr.c:253-266 permits DNS
src/agent.c:219-247 enters connection setup before a caller-enforced per-tuple authorization hook

findings.title: Controlled-role conflict compares the wrong role attribute
evidence: src/agent.c:1474-1484 branches on ice_controlled but compares ice_controlling

findings.title: Callback-thread destroy can self-join and free live state
evidence: src/conn_thread.c:176 permits callback reentry
src/conn_thread.c:193-209 joins then frees
src/thread.h:102-103 discards join failures

findings.title: Application traffic is admitted before regular nomination and profile key confirmation
evidence: src/agent.c:1132-1147 publishes a selected entry before nomination
src/agent.c:670-685 allows send through the selected entry
src/agent.c:834-855 forwards registered-entry payload to cb_recv
